title: London Borough of Tower Hamlets: Explanatory Memorandum
body: "The Explanatory Memorandum to the Directions made under section 15(5) of the Local Government Act 1999 in respect of the London Borough of Tower Hamlets. It summarises the circumstances in which the Secretary of State has made the Directions, their reasons for this exercise of their powers, and the implications of the Directions for this Authority. "
